question: Is the image a realistic photo of a classroom interior shown from a frontal view?
Is there cold white daylight streaming through a window on the left side?
Is there a dark green chalkboard in the back center occupying the upper half of the frame?
Is there a round white wall clock with black hands positioned directly above the chalkboard center?
Is there a tall window to the left of the chalkboard with a white frame?
Does the window have light gray venetian blinds that are half-closed?
Is there a light wood-colored teacher's lectern desk in the front left of the frame?
Are there exactly two laptops placed side by side on the right rear corner of the lectern desk?
Is the left laptop silver aluminum, half-open at approximately 90 degrees, with a black screen?
Is the right laptop a fluorescent yellow-green shell, closed, thinner, and positioned near the desk edge?
Is there a semi-transparent light purple projector on the left side of the lectern desk?
Is the projector lens facing toward the back of the frame, with internal components faintly visible?
Are there exactly two stacks of textbooks (totaling 6 books) on the front left corner of the lectern desk?
Does the first stack contain 3 books with red, blue, and cream white covers?
Does the second stack contain 3 books with dark green, orange, and gray covers?
Is there a transparent acrylic pen holder between the two stacks containing exactly 7 colored pencils with tips pointing up?
Are there exactly two student desks side by side in the front right of the frame?
Is the left student desk surface light gray and the right student desk surface slightly darker gray?
Do both student desks have rounded edges?
Are there exactly two globes on the upper left corner of the left student desk?
Is the front globe a standard blue-green one and the back globe one with bright purple oceans?
Do both globes have black bases and tilted axes leaning to the left?
Are there exactly two potted plants on the right side of the left student desk?
Is one plant a bright green ivy with leaves trailing over the desk edge?
Is the other plant a small green cactus in a white ceramic pot?
Are there exactly 6 cups with straws lined up from left to right on the center of the right student desk?
Is the first cup (leftmost) blue stainless steel with visible condensation?
Is the second cup transparent plastic with a fluorescent green beverage?
Is the third cup matte white with a black straw?
Is the fourth cup transparent glass with a bright purple beverage and white straw?
Is the fifth cup matte black with a fluorescent orange straw?
Is the sixth cup (rightmost) light pink stainless steel with condensation and a silver straw?
Are there exactly two rulers on the front edge of the right student desk?
Is one ruler transparent and placed horizontally, and the other pale yellow and placed slightly diagonally?
Is there exactly one backpack at the lower right corner of each student desk (2 total)?
Is the left backpack black, half-unzipped revealing orange lining?
Is the right backpack dark blue with the zipper fully closed?
Are there exactly two lunch boxes side by side in front of the right backpack?
Is the left lunch box red plastic and tightly sealed, and the right one dark gray metal with rounded corners?
Are the main objects (desks, laptops, cups) free from severe geometric distortions?
Is the image clear, in-focus, and free from significant artifacts?
